entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Recorded for quality and training purposes. Para español, oprima el dos.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Hi, yes, I need to schedule

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Oh, hi.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Part of Pretty Good AI.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Am I speaking with Marcus?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Yes, this is Marcus Thompson. I’ve got that written down right here.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Please tell me your date of birth.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Sure, my date of birth is August 22, 1990. Let me confirm I’ve got that right: August 22, 1990.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: You are all set!

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: How can I help you today?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: I’m looking to schedule an appointment as soon as possible. Can you tell me what times you have available this week?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Right, I have it

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Let me check the visit reason first.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Is this for an acute concern, a routine office visit, a follow-up, a new patient visit, or a physical therapy session?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: It’s for a routine office visit. I’ve written that down: routine office visit. Let’s go from there.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: I can help with that.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: But it looks like you already have an appointment.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: of this type on file. If you want, I can connect you with live support to review it.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Wait, I didn’t write that down. Are you sure there’s an appointment on file? Could you double-check and confirm the exact details for me?

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: I can't confirm that from here right now. I can connect you to our patient support team. However, I'm a pretty good AI and can do many of the things an operator can.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Do you want to give me a try?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Yes, let's go ahead and try to schedule that appointment now. What times do you have open this week?

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: One moment.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: I'll check openings for a routine office visit.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: All right, I’m ready. I’ve got my notes here. Let me know the exact times available.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Connecting you to a representative.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Please wait.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Hold on, I need to get this down. Are you saying someone else is coming on the line? Let me confirm that.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Hello, I’m

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Hello.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: You've reached the Pretty Good AI test line.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Goodbye.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Wait, I still need to book that appointment. Can we go back and check the available times, please?
